estimate.narrative_context: Annual federal tax savings from GA PTET election at Marcus's K-1 income and post-OBBBA SALT cap with phase-out.

scenario_range.computation_method: K-1 income × GA PTET rate × federal marginal rate, less SALT cap floor at AGI > $605K

recommendations._audit_notes: Used post-OBBBA SALT cap differential method; rec file's worked example explicitly cites $73K under post-OBBBA $40K SALT cap with phase-out at $605K+ AGI. Marcus's $3.6M AGI puts SALT cap at $10K floor.

estimate.narrative_context: Net annual benefit from W-2 reduction $480K→$360K balancing FICA savings vs QBI cap.

scenario_range.computation_method: FICA savings on W-2 reduction less QBI deduction loss above phase-in

action_items.description: Engage CPA or compensation specialist (RCReports or similar) for formal reasonable-compensation analysis.
Source industry-benchmark compensation data for specialty mechanical contractor CEO at $40M+ revenue.
Update HIS payroll forward-only at Paychex to reflect new W-2 level on next payroll cycle boundary.
Coordinate with retirement plan to ensure 401(k)/profit-sharing contributions remain compliant and optimal at new W-2 level.
Document analysis and rationale in HIS tax file for audit defense.

recommendations._audit_notes: Net benefit modest because Marcus's W-2 reduction is largely above SS wage base ($184.5K). QBI cap math nearly offsets FICA savings. Real value is alignment with §401(a)(17) limit ($360K) and cash-balance plan optimization.

estimate.narrative_context: Net annual benefit from $50K Catherine W-2 enabling 401(k), DI insurability, backdoor Roth, family-employed-children path; net of FICA cost.

scenario_range.computation_method: Business deduction at marginal rate + 401(k) deferral tax savings - FICA cost

action_items.description: Document Catherine's role with written job description, time commitment, and deliverables for marketing/admin work.
Set defensible salary at $40K-$80K based on industry benchmark for marketing director / admin coordinator role.
Add Catherine to HIS payroll through Paychex with appropriate withholding.
Enroll Catherine in HIS 401(k) plan once eligibility period satisfied.
Underwrite individual disability insurance for Catherine after 6-12 months of W-2 history.
Maintain quarterly documentation file with deliverables, time logs, and evidence of legitimate work.

recommendations._audit_notes: Catherine's prior healthcare REIT marketing experience supports defensibility of role. DI partner_type set to 'Other' since 'Insurance Broker' partner type maps to Health Insurance Broker or Commercial P&C; individual DI uses general broker.
